narrative:
Florence Twp township has 1,345 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.4 percentage points.
